insight.headline: Merchant-owned delivery deprecated
insight.what_changed: Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping. Shipping configuration is moving from legacy delivery profiles to Markets. The GraphQL Admin API will support market-driven shipping configuration starting in API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their integrations to use market-driven shipping configuration. They should use the new Market-driven shipping Admin API to configure shipping directly on a market. This change affects apps that use the GraphQL Admin API and merchant-owned shipping configuration. Developers should review their code and update it to use the new API. They should also test their integrations to ensure they work correctly with market-driven shipping.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping directly on a market, which will help apps support different shipping scenarios. This change will provide more flexibility and control over shipping configuration.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it provides more flexibility and control over shipping configuration. It also aligns with Shopify's move towards market-driven shipping, which will provide more accurate and efficient shipping options.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes fixes and improvements such as validating GCS bundle upload status and fixing long URL wrapping in banner/alert footnotes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Shopify has updated its App Store requirements to include honest and transparent review practices, which applies to all apps published on the Shopify App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants and adding to cart.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly in Markets.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring compatibility dates.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, as of API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: A new lineItem field has been added to the GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates focus on market-driven shipping, GraphQL Admin API, and Hydrogen improvements

themes.title: Market-driven shipping
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly on each market. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration as of API version 2026-07. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping.

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has several updates, including the removal of the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field, the addition of draft order deposit fields, and the introduction of a new lineItem field on the GiftCard object. The API also exposes a new legalEntityId field on the BusinessEntity type.

themes.title: Hydrogen and deployment updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen now deploys to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

actions.text: Update apps to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Update integrations to use the new discountApplications field on DraftOrder
